album.description:
Herbarium.INFO Herbarium Photo Collection: Ferns, Conifers, Cycads, Flowers, Trees, Mosses, Grasses, Pests and Diseases.

3225 species in 222 families and in 67 orders photographed.

39297 images total.

Try also other sites:
Herbarium.INFO •  Plantarium.INFO •  Fungarium.INFO •  Lichenarium.INFO •  Algaerium.INFO
